fallback_recovered.description: Primary route failed but fallback route recovered the request.
fallback_recovered.recommended_action: review primary provider health and latency.

contract_violation.description: Generated invocation payload violated the contract-required fields.
contract_violation.recommended_action: fix invocation payload shaping before retry.

all_providers_failed.description: All attempted providers failed to return a successful response.
all_providers_failed.recommended_action: inspect provider outage, timeout, or retry policy.
